channel.title: MITRE Corporation — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by MITRE Corporation (mitre).

item.title: CVE-2026-51946 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: SQL Injection vulnerability in GoAdminGroup GoAdmin (last release v1.2.26) allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code and obtain sensitive information via the the __sort_type URL parameter on all /admin/info/{table} endpoints

item.title: CVE-2026-38142
item.description: An unauthenticated command injection vulnerability in the /goform/fast_setting_internet_set endpoint of Tenda AC18 v15.03.05.05 allows attackers to execute arbitrary commands via a crafted payload injected into the mac parameter.

item.title: CVE-2026-52198 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in UTT nv518G nv518GV3v3.2.7-210919-161313 allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via the gohead/sub_425994 component

item.title: CVE-2026-52197 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in UTT nv518G nv518GV3v3.2.7-210919-161313 allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via the gohead/sub_44af70 component

item.title: CVE-2026-52196 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in UTT nv518G nv518GV3v3.2.7-210919-161313 allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via the gohead/sub_416f28 component

item.title: CVE-2026-52195 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in UTT nv518G nv518GV3v3.2.7-210919-161313 allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via the gohead/sub_472f08 component

item.title: CVE-2026-52193 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Buffer Overflow vulnerability in UTT nv518G nv518GV3v3.2.7-210919-161313 allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via the gohead/sub_447CAC component

item.title: CVE-2026-37106 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ 🤔
item.description: An issue in DokuWiki 2025-05-14b "Librarian" 56.2 allows a remote attacker to create an account via the register function in inc/auth.php. NOTE: this is disputed by the Supplier because this is the intentional behavior when the product is configured…

item.title: CVE-2026-57919 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: PBackupVSS.exe in Matrix42 Empirum before 25.5 and 26.x before 26.2 creates a named pipe (\\.\pipe\PBackupVSS) with a DACL that grants GENERIC_READ and GENERIC_WRITE permissions to all authenticated users. A low-privileged local attacker can connect…

item.title: CVE-2026-51221
item.description: A buffer overflow in the Get_Attribute_List function of EIPStackGroup OpENer commit 76b95c allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted Common Packet Format (CPF) packet.

item.title: CVE-2026-51219 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A heap buffer overflow in the HighPriorityASDUQueue_hasUnconfirmedIMessages function of lib60870 v2.3.3 to v2.3.6 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted payload.

item.title: CVE-2026-51218
item.description: A heap buffer overflow in the TS7Worker::PerformFunctionWrite() function (/core/s7_server.cpp) of snap7 v1.4.3 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted packet.

item.title: CVE-2026-37637 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: An issue in Alexantr filemanager v.1.0 allows a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code via the filemanager.php component

item.title: CVE-2026-36848 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Gigamon GVOS v5.16.1 and below is vulnerable to Directory Traversal in the GVOS H-VUE subsystem.

item.title: CVE-2026-31016 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Cross Site Request Forgery vulnerability in Squidex.io Squidex CMS v.7.21.0 and before allows a remote attacker to escalate privileges via the IdentityServer account profile endpoint

item.title: CVE-2026-57940 · 2.1 LOW
item.description: HTMLy 3.1.1 contains a Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in the RSS feed import functionality. The function get_feed() in system/admin/admin.php passes user-supplied $feed_url directly to file_get_contents() without any validation. An…

item.title: CVE-2026-57920 · 7.7 HIGH ☁️
item.description: Peplink InControl 2 through 2.14.2 before 2026-06-03 allows use of a semicolon to bypass access-control rules for certain /rest/o/{orgId} endpoints.

item.title: CVE-2026-57918 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: libnfs through 6.0.2 before 935b8db has an xid integer underflow in READ_IOVEC in rpc_read_from_socket in lib/socket.c during a connection to a crafted NFS server, when the expected pdu size exceeds the absolute pdu size from the xid/record-marker.

item.title: CVE-2026-57913 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Johnson & Johnson Audit Tracking Management System (ATMS) before 2026-04-21 allows viewing of meeting minutes and transcripts.

item.title: CVE-2026-57912 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Johnson & Johnson Campus Recruiting before 2025-10-31 allows viewing of data provided by recruited students, and notes entered about students by interviewers.

item.title: CVE-2026-50767 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: A stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the item type administration page of Koha Library Management System 0 through 25.11 versions allow an authenticated remote attacker with administrator privileges to inject arbitrary web scripts via…

item.title: CVE-2026-50766 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: A stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the OPAC item detail page of Koha Library Management System 0 through 25.11 versions allow an authenticated remote attacker with edit_items permission to inject arbitrary web scripts via the item p…

item.title: CVE-2026-50765 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A stored cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the patron restriction type administration page of Koha Library Management System 0 through 25.11 versions allow an authenticated remote attacker with administrator privileges to inject arbitrary w…

item.title: CVE-2026-39031 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Lansweeper lsrunase 2.0 and lsencrypt 2.0 use RC4 encryption with a hardcoded 142-byte static key array to encrypt credentials. An 8-character prefix is stored in cleartext alongside the ciphertext. This allows an attacker with local access to recove…

item.title: CVE-2026-38641 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in the DSO::mmap_and_copy function of relibc commit 61f42d allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via loading a crafted shared library.

item.title: CVE-2026-38639 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in the parse_month function (/time/strptime.rs) of relibc commit ab6a2e allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via parsing a crafted input.

item.title: CVE-2026-38571 · 4.6 MEDIUM
item.description: Cleartext storage and exposure of WPA2 credentials, and missing authentication on the rr/wr memory read/write commands, in the unauthenticated UART debug console of the Tenda N300 F3 (V603) allow a physically proximate attacker to obtain stored WPA2…

item.title: CVE-2026-36908
item.description: A stack overflow in the AP4_Array<AP4_TrunAtom::Entry>::EnsureCapacity component of axiomatic-systems Bento4 before v1.8.9allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted MP4 file.

item.title: CVE-2026-36907
item.description: A stack overflow in the AP4_StsdAtom::AP4_StsdAtom component of axiomatic-systems Bento4 before v1.8.9allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted MP4 file.

item.title: CVE-2026-36478 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in Technitium DNS Server v.14.3 and before allows a remote attacker to cause a denial of service via the DnsServerApp.exe, DnsServerApp.dll, TechnitiumLibrary.Net/Dns/DnsClient.cs components

item.title: CVE-2026-30041 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An integer overflow in the PSD parser compnent of FastStone Image Viewer v8.3 allows attackers to execute arbitrary code or cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted PSD file.

item.title: CVE-2026-30040 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: A heap overflow in the FSViewer.exe process of FastStone Image Viewer v8.3 allows attackers to cause a execute arbitrary code in the context of the current process via supplying a crafted JPEG 2000 (JP2) file.

item.title: CVE-2026-57589 · 7.4 HIGH
item.description: sys/kern/sysv_sem.c in OpenBSD through 7.9 has a use-after-free allowing local privilege escalation to root. This is a context switch use-after-free after tsleep in sys_semget().

item.title: CVE-2026-38640 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A reachable unwrap in the __assert_fail function (/assert/mod.rs) of relibc commit 61f42d allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted string.

item.title: CVE-2026-38637 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: An issue in the pthread_rwlockattr_setpshared() function of relibc commit 61f42d allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted input.

item.title: CVE-2026-37454 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Insecure Permissions vulnerability in MSI NBFoundation Service v.2.0.2506.1201 allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information via the 3DES-ECB encryption

item.title: CVE-2026-37453 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Insecure Permissions vulnerability in MSI NBFoundation Service v.2.0.2506.1201 allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information via the MSI_SERVICE_2 pipe

item.title: CVE-2026-37452 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Insecure Permissions vulnerability in MSI NBFoundation Service v.2.0.2506.1201 allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information via the MSIAPService.exe component

item.title: CVE-2026-37149 · 7.7 HIGH
item.description: GROCERY-STORE-MANAGEMENT-SYSTEM-USING-PHP-AND-MYSQL-PHPMYADMIN v1.0 was discovered to contain a SQL injection vulnerability in the scost parameter in /grocery/search_products.php. This vulnerability allows attackers to access sensitive database infor…

item.title: CVE-2025-60465 · 6.1 MEDIUM
item.description: A use-after-free in the gf_filter_pid_inst_swap function (/filter_core/filter_pid.c) of GPAC Project/MP4Box before 26.02.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted media file.

item.title: CVE-2025-60464 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: A use-after-free in the gf_sei_load_from_state_internal function (/filters/sei_load.c) of GPAC Project/MP4Box before 26.02.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted MPEG-2 TS file.

item.title: CVE-2026-49269 🤔
item.description: Apple M1 GPUs retain register file data between compute shader dispatches from different processes. A sandboxed Metal attacker app can run a GPU reader shader that reads stale register values left by a separate sandboxed victim app. In the proof of c…

item.title: CVE-2025-60474 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A buffer overflow in the gf_media_import function (/media_tools/av_parsers.c) of GPAC Project/MP4Box before 26.02.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted input.

item.title: CVE-2025-60473 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: A NULL pointer dereference in the gf_filter_in_parent_chain function (/filter_core/filter_pid.c) of GPAC Project/MP4Box before 26.02.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted file.

item.title: CVE-2025-60471 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: A use-after-free in the gf_filter_pid_reconfigure_task_discard function (/filter_core/filter_pid.c) of GPAC Project/MP4Box before 26.02.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted media file.

item.title: CVE-2025-60468 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: GPAC Multimedia Open Source Project GPAC Project/MP4Box 2.5-DEV-rev1593-gfe88c3545-master is affected by: Buffer Overflow. The impact is: cause a denial of service (local). The component is: filter_core/filter_pid.c (L:574-580): function gf_filter_pi…

item.title: CVE-2025-60467 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: A use-after-free in the gf_filter_pid_inst_swap_delete_task function (/filter_core/filter_pid.c) of GPAC Project/MP4Box before 26.02.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted media file.

item.title: CVE-2025-60466 · 5 MEDIUM
item.description: A use-after-free in the gf_filter_pid_get_packet function (/filter_core/filter_pid.c) of GPAC Project/MP4Box before 26.02.0 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via supplying a crafted media file.

item.title: CVE-2026-57062 · 2.9 LOW
item.description: CMS (Cryptographic Message Syntax) parsing in gpgsm in GnuPG through 2.5.20 mishandles the CMS format for AES-GCM because aes-ICVlen is supposed to be 12 bytes but 4 bytes is accepted. NOTE: this is related to CVE-2026-34182.

item.title: CVE-2026-50221 · 5.3 MEDIUM
item.description: In OpenStack Swift before 2.37.2, proxy-server does not strip internal update headers (X-Container-Host, X-Container-Device, X-Delete-At-Host, X-Delete-At-Device) from client requests before forwarding them to object-servers. An authenticated user wi…
